creator: patrick@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The forth port (version 0.29.1) is not obsolete.  The current pfe 0.30.95  
follows another path from the original authors intent. Version 0.29.1 is a 
compact forth which will run on many platforms, while 0.30.X is a more 
complete, robust forth which will run on many platorms. 

0.29.1 is considered stable, while 0.30.X is a work in progress. 

There wil be a time when the forth port is obsolete, but not yet ;)
